items.name: Midnight Drape Halter Top
items.description:
Sleek, smooth, and striking — this black draped halter top is perfect for night-out glam or chic streetwear looks. The silky finish and low back create a luxe yet versatile style for any avatar occasion.

items.name: R6 Chibi Girl Torso For Skelly Bundle
items.description:
this chibi torso best suited with skelly torso ! so any chibi accesories would fit over this torso remade in R6 form! accesory adjustment required.

also,roblox might reduce the corset image quality, try adding more front accesories to fix it . 

skelly bundle:
https://www.roblox.com/bundles/353/Skelly
